chunks.text: CS Enrollments - EECS at Berkeley CS Enrollments CS Major FAQ – scroll to Enrollment Information section. Getting into CS classes To see semester-specific Computer Science class enrollment updates, sign up for EECS 101 on Ed Stem. Relevant posts are pinned and you can also use the search bar.
